title: Passive Mending
description: Automatically repairs items with Mending using XP directly from your experience bar.
body:
# Passive Mending (NeoForge)

**Forget about holding items to mend them!**

## 🛠 How it works
This is a server-side **NeoForge** mod. It automatically repairs your equipment using your XP bar.
The mod runs a check every second (20 ticks). If you have XP, it will repair items equipped in your **Armor slots**, **Main Hand**, and **Off-hand**.

### ✨ Features
* **Passive Repair:** Repairs armor and held items automatically without needing to gather XP orbs.
* **Smart Conversion:** Uses the standard vanilla ratio: **1 XP = 2 Durability**.
* **Server-Side Only:** Install it on the server, and vanilla clients can join without installing anything!
